plan.caption:
A Brilliant Stars ETB is sitting at $166 sealed. Crack it open and you are looking at an average return of $50. That $116 gap tells you everything you need to know.

The verdict at pokeev.com is clear: keep it sealed. The chase cards are real. Charizard V at $346, Umbreon VMAX at $111, Mimikyu V at $85. But averages do not lie, and the math does not favor the rip. Sealed price wins by a wide margin here.

We run these numbers on every major set and product so you never have to guess. Pull the full Brilliant Stars breakdown and every other set EV at pokeev.com.

Would you rip this ETB or keep it sealed? Drop your answer below.

brief.reason: Opening averages $50. Sealed ETB holds at $166.|The $116 gap makes this a hold, not a rip.
